$comment: Pairs (and small groups) of SPL strings that MUST collapse to the same canonical form. The fingerprint test asserts every group hashes to a single value.

groups.name: search-clause-key-order
groups.description: kv pair order is irrelevant in the search clause.

groups.name: operator-tweaks-dropped-head
groups.description: Trailing | head N is treated as a debug command.
spl: index=foo | stats count BY host | head 100

groups.name: operator-tweaks-dropped-tail
groups.description: Trailing | tail N is treated as a debug command.
spl: index=foo | stats count BY host | tail 50

groups.name: operator-tweaks-dropped-dedup-n
groups.description: | dedup 1 host is a debug-only narrowing.
spl: index=foo | stats count BY host | dedup 1 host

groups.name: operator-tweaks-trailing-eventstats-count
spl: index=foo | stats count BY host | eventstats count

groups.name: whitespace-normalisation
groups.description: Whitespace runs collapse; padding around `|` and `=` is removed.
spl: index = foo |  stats count BY host

groups.name: quoting-style
groups.description: Single vs double quotes are normalised to double.

groups.name: bare-vs-quoted
groups.description: Bare-word values quote up; equivalent to the quoted form.

groups.name: kv-with-mixed-operators
groups.description: Different operators (=, !=, >=, <) with same keys still sort deterministically.

groups.name: where-clause-untouched
groups.description: Pipe stages after the search clause keep their token order even when they contain kv-style filters.
